purpose: Round-10 locked mesh2motion body manifest for the d-full-match Showroom, consolidating Round-9 adherence lanes: dynamic hand-bone weapons, UV-painted skin, small localized gore marks, and body-tracking armour prop/region modes.
notes: Round-10 schema 9 manifest: the root mesh2motion body remains the universal substrate for all eight personas; persona body substitution is intentionally absent.
Weapons are consolidated on dynamic hand-bone attachment only; the static root-socket negative control is retired from manifest/UI selection.
Skin is consolidated on UV-painted body textures/materials; the opportunist sticker-decal skin is converted to a UV texture treatment.
Duelist/camper/paranoid donate their old broad gore decals into armorRegion and replace corpse gore with many small localized bone-attached marks.
Armour compares two body-tracking candidates: modular props following live BoneAttachment3D sockets and donated adhering-region coverage.

license.name: CC0 1.0 Universal / Public Domain
license.notes: LICENSE-CC0.MD states 3D models, blend files, rigs, and animations are CC0.

body.notes: Shared Round-7 consolidated mesh2motion body for all personas; Scott Petrovic / Mesh2Motion CC0 human-base animation GLB selected after Round-6 showroom evaluation.

corpseBody.notes: Shared mesh2motion body, paused on the Death01 final frame. Per-persona corpse-skin variants apply at instance time; no standalone corpse GLB remains.

skin.rationale: Round-5 palette baseline retained as the control sample so the other seven skin techniques have a no-technique anchor.
skin.sourcePack: engineer-procedural-fallback (Round-5 palette_flat control; retained intentionally per Round-8 research log)

corpse.rationale: Whole-body deep blood saturation keeps the cheapest gore path loud, wet, and readable on the shared body.

assets.notes: rat persona: palette_flat skin control + blood_saturation_overlay corpse gore. All Round-7 skin/gore assets are local generated CC0 prototypes unless otherwise noted. Round-9: uses the universal mesh2motion body by absence of persona body override. Round-8 WP-D: skin.sourcePack=engineer-procedural-fallback (Round-5 palette_flat control; retained intentionally per Round-8 research log); corpse.sourcePack=OGA-LiquidSplatterPixelTexture-CC0 + material-saturation fallback; armorOverlay=null material-swap control; preferred showroom weapon=rusty_blade.

skin.rationale: A compact PBR atlas sample makes the duelist read as crafted, weighted, and materially richer than the palette-only baseline.

corpse.rationale: A cluster of torso slash and puncture marks reads as close-quarters overkill for the weapon-forward persona. Round-10 re-approach: split into many small localized marks so each stays near one dominant bone instead of spanning joints as a broad patch.

assets.notes: duelist persona: pbr_texture_atlas skin using ambientCG MetalPlates017A 1K-PNG (CC0, https://ambientcg.com/view?id=MetalPlates017A) for all 5 PBR maps + wound_cluster_decals corpse gore. Round-7.1 touch-up: replaced near-blank engineer-procedural maps with the real ambientCG set; other skin/gore textures regenerated procedurally with visible content at 512x512. Round-9: uses the universal mesh2motion body by absence of persona body override. Round-8 WP-D: skin.sourcePack=ambientCG-MetalPlates017A-CC0; corpse.sourcePack=OGA-BloodSplatterAndGibs-CC0; armorOverlay=quaternius_chest_plate; preferred showroom weapon=sword.

armorOverlay.name: quaternius_chest_plate
armorOverlay.rationale: Chest piece tests the Round-8 modular sub-mesh armor path against the torso where wrapping matters most.
armorOverlay.notes: Rigid CC0 armour prop; Round-10 attaches the prop under a live BoneAttachment3D on spine_03 instead of injecting a single-bone identity Skin.

round8Evaluation.goreVariant: torso wound_cluster_decals from CC0 gib/splatter sheet split into small localized Round-10 marks
round8Evaluation.weapon: sword / Robin Lamb CC0 known-good control
round8Evaluation.armor: Quaternius chest modular_submesh plus donated adhering_region coverage
round8Evaluation.adherence: small bone_attached gore plus body-tracking armour region

armorRegion.rationale: Donated Round-9 broad torso wound-cluster projection, repurposed as flat armour-region coverage for comparison against the dynamic chest prop.
armorRegion.limitation: Flat broad region tracks the selected bones but has no plate thickness and is not multi-bone skinned.

skin.rationale: A sourced cloth pattern gives the trader a data-market read while staying on the body UVs instead of world-space sampling.

corpse.rationale: A wide floor-projected blood pool implies slow bleed-out and creates a distinct corpse treatment without changing body geometry.

assets.notes: trader persona: pattern_texture skin using local generated hex pattern + gore_pool_decal corpse gore. Round-9: uses the universal mesh2motion body by absence of persona body override. Round-8 WP-D: skin.sourcePack=ambientCG-Fabric029-CC0; corpse.sourcePack=OGA-LiquidSplatterPixelTexture-CC0; armorOverlay=null material-swap control; preferred showroom weapon=dagger.

round8Evaluation.skinTreatment: pattern_texture using sourced ambientCG Fabric029 UV control

skin.rationale: A UV-sampled sourced body texture keeps the opportunist on the skinned mesh and removes the floating bone-pinned sticker skin from Round 9.

corpse.rationale: Charred albedo plus hot ember emission makes the opportunist look fatally fried and burned through.
corpse.sourcePack: engineer-procedural-fallback (no CC0 full-body charred mesh2motion overlay found; see Round-8 research log)

assets.notes: opportunist persona: pattern_texture UV-painted skin using TheNess CC0 body texture + charred_burned_texture corpse gore. Round-10: removed the prior bone-attached sticker-decal skin because it floated/slid in Showroom UAT. Universal mesh2motion body remains locked.

skin.rationale: A hard-ramped toon shader turns the paranoid into a graphic-novel panic silhouette and samples non-PBR shader styling.
skin.sourcePack: ambientCG-Leather034B-CC0 visual-material reference + toon shader fallback

corpse.rationale: Projected red gashes with pale exposed bone literalize the persona's nightmare as an extreme corpse read. Round-10 re-approach: split into many small localized marks so each stays near one dominant bone instead of spanning joints as a broad patch.

assets.notes: paranoid persona: toon_cel_shader skin from local shader + exposed_bone_decals corpse gore. Round-9: uses the universal mesh2motion body by absence of persona body override. Round-8 WP-D: skin.sourcePack=ambientCG-Leather034B-CC0 visual-material reference + toon shader fallback; corpse.sourcePack=OGA-LiquidSplatterPixelTexture-CC0; armorOverlay=quaternius_crown_helmet; preferred showroom weapon=dagger.

armorOverlay.name: quaternius_crown_helmet
armorOverlay.rationale: Helmet tests modular_submesh armor at a high-motion head attachment point distinct from torso armor.
armorOverlay.notes: Rigid CC0 armour prop; Round-10 attaches the prop under a live BoneAttachment3D on head instead of injecting a single-bone identity Skin.

round8Evaluation.goreVariant: exposed_bone_decals using imported CC0 liquid splatter source split into small localized Round-10 marks
round8Evaluation.armor: Quaternius helmet modular_submesh plus donated adhering_region coverage
round8Evaluation.adherence: small bone_attached gore plus body-tracking armour region

armorRegion.rationale: Donated Round-9 broad exposed-bone projection, repurposed as flat armour-region coverage for comparison against the dynamic helmet prop.
armorRegion.limitation: Flat broad region tracks the selected bones but has no plate thickness and is not multi-bone skinned.

skin.rationale: Dark body with neon trim samples cyberpunk glow without depending on bloom and fits the held-position camper read.

corpse.rationale: Chest and abdomen viscera projections make the death-pose body look opened up rather than merely tinted. Round-10 re-approach: split into many small localized marks so each stays near one dominant bone instead of spanning joints as a broad patch.

assets.notes: camper persona: emissive_trim_shader skin with local trim mask + viscera_projection corpse gore. Round-9: uses the universal mesh2motion body by absence of persona body override. Round-8 WP-D: skin.sourcePack=ambientCG-Fabric029-CC0 + engineer-procedural trim-mask fallback; corpse.sourcePack=OGA-BloodSplatterAndGibs-CC0; armorOverlay=null material-swap control; preferred showroom weapon=axe.

round8Evaluation.skinTreatment: emissive_trim_shader with sourced fabric base reference
round8Evaluation.goreVariant: viscera_projection sourced gib-sheet control split into small localized Round-10 marks
round8Evaluation.armor: Round-5 material-swap control plus donated adhering_region coverage
round8Evaluation.adherence: small bone_attached gore plus body-tracking armour region

armorRegion.rationale: Donated Round-9 broad viscera projection, repurposed as flat torso armour-region coverage where no modular prop exists.
armorRegion.limitation: Flat broad region tracks the selected bones but has no plate thickness and is not multi-bone skinned.

skin.rationale: Per-part material assignments sample mismatched speed-build body segmentation without adding accessories or changing the mesh.

corpse.rationale: Shared-body-only bone hiding with stump gore tests a mesh-level dismemberment read without introducing a second corpse GLB.

assets.notes: sprinter persona: multi_material_split skin + dismemberment_baked corpse gore restricted to shared-body-only bone_hide per Round-7 amendment A1. Round-9: uses the universal mesh2motion body by absence of persona body override. Round-8 WP-D: skin.sourcePack=OGA-MakeHuman-AnnotatedSkin-CC0 + engineer-procedural mesh2motion-region fallback; corpse.sourcePack=OGA-BloodSplatterAndGibs-CC0 + mesh-baked dismemberment transform; armorOverlay=null material-swap control; preferred showroom weapon=rusty_blade.

round8Evaluation.adherence: mesh_baked corpse state plus uv_painted skin

skin.rationale: View-dependent rim light makes the vulture feel scavenger-ghost and samples a fresnel shader branch distinct from toon and trim.

corpse.rationale: Immediate drained desaturation makes the corpse look dead-cold and sickly rather than freshly wet.

assets.notes: vulture persona: rim_fresnel_shader skin from local shader + decay_desaturation corpse gore from local shader. Round-9: uses the universal mesh2motion body by absence of persona body override. Round-8 WP-D: skin.sourcePack=OGA-TheNess-HumanBodyTexture-CC0 + rim shader fallback; corpse.sourcePack=OGA-LiquidSplatterPixelTexture-CC0 + decay shader fallback; armorOverlay=quaternius_gauntlet; preferred showroom weapon=greatsword.

armorOverlay.name: quaternius_gauntlet
armorOverlay.rationale: Gauntlet tests modular_submesh armor on a limb endpoint so users can compare it against bone-attached flat decals.
armorOverlay.notes: Rigid CC0 armour prop; Round-10 attaches the prop under a live BoneAttachment3D on hand_l instead of injecting a single-bone identity Skin.

round8Evaluation.adherence: modular_submesh armor with uv_painted shader controls
